ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1645, and was Secretary of the Academy in 1646. In a public gathering, he delivered an apparently successful oration on `la sublimita` della Gloria Eroica`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
